description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Installer that runs on push to master, develop, actions_shared branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master and develop. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository with recursive submodules, installs Python dependencies, extracts the CoolProp version from CMakeLists.txt, configures CMake with Release build type, builds the project, creates a tarball of the shared library, and uploads it as a release artifact if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
